docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAL LEONARD CORPORATION, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE SHEET MUSIC SERVICE, INC., A CORPORATIO N DBA BYRON HOYT SHEET MUSIC SERVICE BYRONHOYT.COM, LLC., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1-50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-24-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-09-2004

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAL LEONARD CORPORATION, A CORPORATION SERVED MAY-03-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE SHEET MUSIC SERVICE, INC., A CORPORATIO N DBA BYRON HOYT SHEET MUSIC SERVICE BYRONHOYT.COM, LLC., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $397.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE SHEET MUSIC SERVICE, INC., A CORPORATIO N DBA BYRON HOYT SHEET MUSIC SERVICE BYRONHOYT.COM, LLC., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAL LEONARD CORPORATION, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE SHEET MUSIC SERVICE, INC., A CORPORATIO N DBA BYRON HOYT SHEET MUSIC SERVICE BYRONHOYT.COM, LLC., A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $43,350.29 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,269.08 INTEREST, $397.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $46,676.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ONLY UPON THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT . AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-50, INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-24-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
